6 — Output

▼ 
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://spacetelescope.github.io/guidestar/guidestar-controls.css">
<div data-guidestar
     data-guidestar-config='{"htmlSrc":"wireframes/kitchen-sink.html","steps":[...],"viewport":null}'
     style="height: 380px; width: 100%;">
</div>
<script src="https://spacetelescope.github.io/guidestar/guidestar-controller.js"></script>
.. guidestar-demo:: _static/kitchen-sink.html
   :height: 380px
   :steps-json: [{"target":"#btn-sidebar","action":"click","delay":1500},
                 {"target":"#input-search","action":"type-text","value":"pipeline","delay":1200}]
